title: AI Chat Exporter: Save ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude to PDF, Word and More - Chrome Web Store
excerpt: AI Chat Exporter for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Grok. Export chats to PDF, Word, Google Docs and Notion in a few clicks.
content_html:
Overview

AI Chat Exporter for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Grok. Export chats to PDF, Word, Google Docs and Notion in a few clicks.

AI Chat Exporter is an all-in-one conversation exporter that turns your AI chats into ready-to-use documents, so you never have to copy and paste manually again. Export selected messages or an entire conversation in just a few clicks. Customize the font family, font size, and text color before exporting, then continue editing, sharing, printing, archiving, or organizing the content in your preferred workspace. AI Exporter helps you preserve valuable AI answers, code sessions, research, writing drafts, project discussions, and structured outputs so useful work never gets lost in a long chat thread. ## Key Features ### Works across the AI platforms you already use AI Chat Exporter works across the AI platforms you already use, giving you one consistent export workflow for different AI assistants: - ChatGPT: export answers, code, tables, and research sessions - Gemini: save chats for editing, sharing, printing, or documentation - Claude: export conversations, artifacts, and structured content - Grok: save chats and continue working with the content elsewhere There's no need for a separate exporter for every platform you use. ### Export AI chats to multiple formats AI Chat Exporter lets you choose the format that fits your workflow: - PDF for printing, archiving, offline reading, or sharing - Word (.docx) for editing, formatting, or reusing the content - Google Docs for collaboration and online editing - Notion for knowledge management, project planning, and organized notes ### Export selected messages or the full conversation - Select individual messages, sections, code blocks, or tables - Export only the answers that are relevant to your work - Save a complete conversation for full context and archiving - Great for long research sessions, writing sessions, and technical discussions ### Customize your exported document Before exporting, AI Chat Exporter lets you adjust the appearance of your document: - Choose the font family - Change the font size - Select the text color - Only output results from your AI or prompt. This gives you more control than basic copy and paste, especially when exporting long AI conversations for work, study, documentation, or team sharing. ### Preserves rich conversation structure The extension is built to keep formatting intact on export, including headings, numbered and bulleted lists, code blocks, tables, mathematical formulas, links, and images. Support may vary depending on the platform and conversation type. ### Fast, account free workflow - Works directly on the chat page you're already using - Export in just a few clicks, no separate account or API key needed for standard exports - Exporting to an external workspace requires signing in to that service ## Use Cases ### Developers and engineers AI Chat Exporter helps developers save coding sessions, debugging conversations, technical explanations, architecture plans, API notes, and code review discussions. Export AI coding conversations to Markdown for documentation, Word for editing, PDF for sharing, Google Docs for collaboration, or Notion for internal knowledge management. ### Writers and editors Move article outlines, drafts, edited paragraphs, and content briefs into your preferred document or workspace, without manually copying each response. ### Researchers and analysts Archive research summaries, comparative analyses, market research, and structured findings, and send them wherever your workflow needs them next. ### Students and academics Save study notes, explanations, summaries, and essay outlines for offline reference or further editing, in whatever format suits you. ### Professionals and teams AI Chat Exporter helps turn AI conversations into reusable business documents. Save meeting preparation, project plans, brainstorming sessions, marketing ideas, customer research, internal guidelines, process documentation, and team knowledge in a format that is easy to share. ### Content creators Save video outlines, script drafts, newsletter ideas, and content calendars, then keep developing them in your organized workspace of choice. ### Consultants and freelancers Convert client discussions into proposals, reports, and recommendations, with typography customized for a polished, professional finish. ### Knowledge management Build a personal or team library of prompts, answers, code examples, and research findings outside the original chat. ## How to Export an AI Chat 1. Install AI Chat Exporter from the Chrome Web Store. 2. Open your AI chat platform and start or open a conversation. 3. Optionally customize the font family, font size, and text color. 4. Choose to export the full conversation or only selected messages. 5. Pick your destination and export. ## Permissions and Requirements AI Chat Exporter only requests the access it needs to provide its export features: - Access to the AI chat page you choose to export - Download permission to save files to your device - Access to your chosen online workspace, only when you select that kind of export Conversation content is accessed only when needed to prepare the export you request. For full details on data handling, storage, and third-party integrations, please review the official Privacy Policy before installing. Requirements: Google Chrome, an active session on a supported AI platform, and an account with your chosen export destination if it requires one, such as Google Docs or Notion. ## Why Use AI Chat Exporter - One extension for all your AI conversation exports - One click export to the format you need - Save selected messages or complete conversations - Customize font, size, and color before exporting - Preserves text, lists, code blocks, tables, and structured content - Cuts out repetitive copying and pasting - No separate account required - Regularly updated to maintain compatibility ## Frequently Asked Questions ### What is AI Chat Exporter? AI Chat Exporter is a Chrome extension that lets you export AI conversations from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Grok to PDF, Word, Google Docs, Notion, or Markdown. ### Is AI Chat Exporter free? Yes. The free plan includes 7 full conversation exports and 10 selected message exports per month, across all supported destinations. ### Which platforms are supported? ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Grok today, with more planned in future updates. ### Which export formats are available? PDF, Word (.docx), Google Docs, and Notion. ### Does it support tables and structured content? Yes. AI Chat Exporter supports common AI conversation content such as tables, lists, headings, code blocks, links, images, mathematical formulas, and structured responses. Results may vary depending on the platform and export format. ### Do I need an account? No separate account is required, though some destinations require signing in to their own service. ### Can I use AI Chat Exporter for long conversations? Yes, though performance can vary with conversation length and complexity. ### Is my conversation uploaded during export? Only the content needed to generate the export you request is accessed. See the Privacy Policy for full details. ## Important Links - Official Website: https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter - Support and Feedback: hi@backrun.co - Privacy Policy: https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/help.html - Report a Bug or Request a Feature: https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/contact.php ## Changelog ### Version 1.0.0, Initial release - Export conversations from multiple AI platforms - Export to documents and cloud workspaces in a range of formats - Select individual messages or export the full conversation - Customize font family, font size, and text color - Preserve formatting, math equations, code blocks, lists, and tables ## Disclaimer AI Chat Exporter is an independent third party browser extension. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to the developers of the platforms and services it supports. All product names, logos, and brands mentioned are trademarks of their respective owners.

Details

  • Version

    1.0.1

  • Updated

    July 19, 2026

  • Size

    324KiB

  • Languages

    10 languages

  • Developer

  • Non-trader

    This developer has not identified itself as a trader. For consumers in the European Union, please note that consumer rights do not apply to contracts between you and this developer.

Privacy

Manage extensions and learn how they're being used in your organization

AI Chat Exporter: Save ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude to PDF, Word and More has disclosed the following information regarding the collection and usage of your data. More detailed information can be found in the developer's privacy policy.

AI Chat Exporter: Save ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude to PDF, Word and More handles the following:

Personally identifiable information

Website content

This developer declares that your data is

  • Not being sold to third parties, outside of the approved use cases
  • Not being used or transferred for purposes that are unrelated to the item's core functionality
  • Not being used or transferred to determine creditworthiness or for lending purposes

Support

For help with questions, suggestions, or problems, visit the developer's support site

sentences.en: AI Chat Exporter is an all-in-one conversation exporter that turns your AI chats into ready-to-use documents, so you never have to copy and paste manually again.
sentences.zh: AI Chat Exporter 是一款一体化对话导出器，可将您的 AI 聊天转换为即用型文档，因此您无需再次手动复制和粘贴。

sentences.en: Export selected messages or an entire conversation in just a few clicks.
sentences.zh: 只需单击几下即可导出选定的消息或整个对话。

sentences.en: Customize the font family, font size, and text color before exporting, then continue editing, sharing, printing, archiving, or organizing the content in your preferred workspace.
sentences.zh: 在导出之前自定义字体系列、字体大小和文本颜色，然后继续在您的首选工作区中编辑、共享、打印、存档或组织内容。

sentences.en: AI Exporter helps you preserve valuable AI answers, code sessions, research, writing drafts, project discussions, and structured outputs so useful work never gets lost in a long chat thread. ## Key Features ### Works across the AI platforms you already use AI Chat Exporter works across the AI platforms you already use, giving you one consistent export workflow for different AI assistants: - ChatGPT: export answers, code, tables, and research sessions - Gemini: save chats for editing, sharing, printing, or documentation - Claude: export conversations, artifacts, and structured content - Grok: save chats and continue working with the content elsewhere There's no need for a separate exporter for every platform you use. ### Export AI chats to multiple formats AI Chat Exporter lets you choose the format that fits your workflow: - PDF for printing, archiving, offline reading, or sharing - Word (.docx) for editing, formatting, or reusing the content - Google Docs for collaboration and online editing - Notion for knowledge management, project planning, and organized notes ### Export selected messages or the full conversation - Select individual messages, sections, code blocks, or tables - Export only the answers that are relevant to your work - Save a complete conversation for full context and archiving - Great for long research sessions, writing sessions, and technical discussions ### Customize your exported document Before exporting, AI Chat Exporter lets you adjust the appearance of your document: - Choose the font family - Change the font size - Select the text color - Only output results from your AI or prompt.
sentences.zh: AI Exporter 可帮助您保留有价值的 AI 答案、代码会话、研究、撰写草稿、项目讨论和结构化输出，因此有用的工作永远不会在长聊天线程中丢失。 ## 主要功能 ### 适用于您已使用的 AI 平台 AI Chat Exporter 适用于您已使用的 AI 平台，为不同的 AI 助手提供一致的导出工作流程： - ChatGPT：导出答案、代码、表格和研究会话 - Gemini：保存聊天以进行编辑、共享、打印或文档 - Claude：导出对话、工件和结构化内容 - Grok：保存聊天并继续在其他地方处理内容 您无需为您使用的每个平台使用单独的导出器。 ### 将 AI 聊天导出为多种格式 AI Chat Exporter 可让您选择适合您工作流程的格式： - PDF 用于打印、存档、离线阅读或共享 - Word (.docx) 用于编辑、格式化或重复使用内容 - Google Docs 用于协作和在线编辑 - 用于知识管理、项目规划和组织笔记的概念 ### 导出选定的消息或完整对话 - 选择单个消息、部分、代码块或表格 - 仅导出与您的工作相关的答案 - 保存完整的对话以获取完整的上下文和内容存档 - 非常适合长时间的研究会议、写作会议和技术讨论 ### 自定义导出的文档 在导出之前，AI Chat Exporter 允许您调整文档的外观： - 选择字体系列 - 更改字体大小 - 选择文本颜色 - 仅输出 AI 或提示的结果。

sentences.en: This gives you more control than basic copy and paste, especially when exporting long AI conversations for work, study, documentation, or team sharing. ### Preserves rich conversation structure The extension is built to keep formatting intact on export, including headings, numbered and bulleted lists, code blocks, tables, mathematical formulas, links, and images.
sentences.zh: 与基本的复制和粘贴相比，这为您提供了更多控制权，尤其是在导出用于工作、学习、文档或团队共享的长 AI 对话时。 ### 保留丰富的对话结构 该扩展旨在在导出时保持格式完整，包括标题、编号和项目符号列表、代码块、表格、数学公式、链接和图像。

sentences.en: Support may vary depending on the platform and conversation type. ### Fast, account free workflow - Works directly on the chat page you're already using - Export in just a few clicks, no separate account or API key needed for standard exports - Exporting to an external workspace requires signing in to that service ## Use Cases ### Developers and engineers AI Chat Exporter helps developers save coding sessions, debugging conversations, technical explanations, architecture plans, API notes, and code review discussions.
sentences.zh: 支持可能会因平台和对话类型而异。 ### 快速、无需帐户的工作流程 - 直接在您正在使用的聊天页面上工作 - 只需点击几下即可导出，标准导出不需要单独的帐户或 API 密钥 - 导出到外部工作区需要登录该服务 ## 使用案例 ### 开发人员和工程师 AI Chat Exporter 可帮助开发人员保存编码会话、调试对话、技术说明、架构计划、API 注释和代码审查讨论。

sentences.en: Export AI coding conversations to Markdown for documentation, Word for editing, PDF for sharing, Google Docs for collaboration, or Notion for internal knowledge management. ### Writers and editors Move article outlines, drafts, edited paragraphs, and content briefs into your preferred document or workspace, without manually copying each response. ### Researchers and analysts Archive research summaries, comparative analyses, market research, and structured findings, and send them wherever your workflow needs them next. ### Students and academics Save study notes, explanations, summaries, and essay outlines for offline reference or further editing, in whatever format suits you. ### Professionals and teams AI Chat Exporter helps turn AI conversations into reusable business documents.
sentences.zh: 将 AI 编码对话导出到 Markdown 进行文档记录、Word 进行编辑、PDF 进行共享、Google Docs 进行协作或 Notion 进行内部知识管理。 ### 作者和编辑将文章大纲、草稿、编辑过的段落和内容摘要移至您首选的文档或工作区，而无需手动复制每个回复。 ### 研究人员和分析师将研究摘要、比较分析、市场研究和结构化调查结果存档，并将其发送到您的工作流程下一步需要的地方。 ### 学生和学者以任何适合您的格式保存学习笔记、解释、摘要和论文大纲，以供离线参考或进一步编辑。 ### 专业人士和团队 AI Chat Exporter 帮助将 AI 对话转化为可重复使用的业务文档。

sentences.en: Save meeting preparation, project plans, brainstorming sessions, marketing ideas, customer research, internal guidelines, process documentation, and team knowledge in a format that is easy to share. ### Content creators Save video outlines, script drafts, newsletter ideas, and content calendars, then keep developing them in your organized workspace of choice. ### Consultants and freelancers Convert client discussions into proposals, reports, and recommendations, with typography customized for a polished, professional finish. ### Knowledge management Build a personal or team library of prompts, answers, code examples, and research findings outside the original chat. ## How to Export an AI Chat 1.
sentences.zh: 以易于共享的格式保存会议准备、项目计划、头脑风暴会议、营销创意、客户研究、内部指南、流程文档和团队知识。 ### 内容创建者保存视频大纲、脚本草稿、新闻通讯想法和内容日历，然后在您选择的有组织的工作空间中继续开发它们。 ### 顾问和自由职业者将客户的讨论转化为提案、报告和建议，并使用定制的排版以达到精美、专业的效果。 ### 知识管理在原始聊天之外构建提示、答案、代码示例和研究结果的个人或团队库。 ## 如何导出 AI 聊天 1.

sentences.en: Install AI Chat Exporter from the Chrome Web Store.
sentences.zh: 从 Chrome 网上应用店安装 AI Chat Exporter。

sentences.en: Open your AI chat platform and start or open a conversation.
sentences.zh: 打开您的 AI 聊天平台并开始或打开对话。

sentences.en: Optionally customize the font family, font size, and text color.
sentences.zh: 可以选择自定义字体系列、字体大小和文本颜色。

sentences.en: Choose to export the full conversation or only selected messages.
sentences.zh: 选择导出完整对话或仅导出选定的消息。

sentences.en: Pick your destination and export. ## Permissions and Requirements AI Chat Exporter only requests the access it needs to provide its export features: - Access to the AI chat page you choose to export - Download permission to save files to your device - Access to your chosen online workspace, only when you select that kind of export Conversation content is accessed only when needed to prepare the export you request.
sentences.zh: 选择您的目的地并出口。 ## 权限和要求 AI Chat Exporter 仅请求提供其导出功能所需的访问权限： - 访问您选择导出的 AI 聊天页面 - 下载将文件保存到您的设备的权限 - 访问您选择的在线工作区，仅当您选择该类型的导出时 仅当需要准备您请求的导出时才访问对话内容。

sentences.en: For full details on data handling, storage, and third-party integrations, please review the official Privacy Policy before installing.
sentences.zh: 有关数据处理、存储和第三方集成的完整详细信息，请在安装前查看官方隐私政策。

sentences.en: Requirements: Google Chrome, an active session on a supported AI platform, and an account with your chosen export destination if it requires one, such as Google Docs or Notion. ## Why Use AI Chat Exporter - One extension for all your AI conversation exports - One click export to the format you need - Save selected messages or complete conversations - Customize font, size, and color before exporting - Preserves text, lists, code blocks, tables, and structured content - Cuts out repetitive copying and pasting - No separate account required - Regularly updated to maintain compatibility ## Frequently Asked Questions ### What is AI Chat Exporter?
sentences.zh: 要求：Google Chrome、受支持的 AI 平台上的活动会话以及具有您选择的导出目的地的帐户（如果需要），例如 Google Docs 或 Notion。 ## 为什么使用 AI Chat Exporter - 所有 AI 对话导出的一个扩展 - 一键导出为您需要的格式 - 保存选定的消息或完整对话 - 导出前自定义字体、大小和颜色 - 保留文本、列表、代码块、表格和结构化内容 - 消除重复的复制和粘贴 - 无需单独的帐户 - 定期更新以保持兼容性 ## 常见问题 ### 什么是 AI Chat Exporter？

sentences.en: AI Chat Exporter is a Chrome extension that lets you export AI conversations from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Grok to PDF, Word, Google Docs, Notion, or Markdown. ### Is AI Chat Exporter free?
sentences.zh: AI Chat Exporter 是一款 Chrome 扩展程序，可让您将 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude 和 Grok 中的 AI 对话导出为 PDF、Word、Google Docs、Notion 或 Markdown。 ### AI Chat Exporter 是免费的吗？

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: The free plan includes 7 full conversation exports and 10 selected message exports per month, across all supported destinations. ### Which platforms are supported?
sentences.zh: 免费计划包括每月 7 次完整对话导出和 10 次选定消息导出，涵盖所有支持的目的地。 ### 支持哪些平台？

sentences.en: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Grok today, with more planned in future updates. ### Which export formats are available?
sentences.zh: 今天有 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude 和 Grok，并计划在未来的更新中提供更多内容。 ### 有哪些导出格式可用？

sentences.en: PDF, Word (.docx), Google Docs, and Notion. ### Does it support tables and structured content?
sentences.zh: PDF、Word (.docx)、Google 文档和 Notion。 ### 它支持表格和结构化内容吗？

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: AI Chat Exporter supports common AI conversation content such as tables, lists, headings, code blocks, links, images, mathematical formulas, and structured responses.
sentences.zh: AI Chat Exporter 支持常见的 AI 对话内容，例如表格、列表、标题、代码块、链接、图像、数学公式和结构化响应。

sentences.en: Results may vary depending on the platform and export format. ### Do I need an account?
sentences.zh: 结果可能因平台和导出格式而异。 ### 我需要一个帐户吗？

sentences.en: No separate account is required, though some destinations require signing in to their own service. ### Can I use AI Chat Exporter for long conversations?
sentences.zh: 尽管某些目的地需要登录其自己的服务，但不需要单独的帐户。 ### 我可以使用 AI Chat Exporter 进行长时间对话吗？

sentences.en: Yes, though performance can vary with conversation length and complexity. ### Is my conversation uploaded during export?
sentences.zh: 是的，但性能可能会因对话长度和复杂程度而异。 ### 我的对话是否在导出过程中上传？

sentences.en: Only the content needed to generate the export you request is accessed.
sentences.zh: 仅访问生成您请求的导出所需的内容。

sentences.en: See the Privacy Policy for full details. ## Important Links - Official Website: https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter - Support and Feedback: hi@backrun.co - Privacy Policy: https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/help.html - Report a Bug or Request a Feature: https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/contact.php ## Changelog ### Version 1.0.0, Initial release - Export conversations from multiple AI platforms - Export to documents and cloud workspaces in a range of formats - Select individual messages or export the full conversation - Customize font family, font size, and text color - Preserve formatting, math equations, code blocks, lists, and tables ## Disclaimer AI Chat Exporter is an independent third party browser extension.
sentences.zh: 有关完整详细信息，请参阅隐私政策。 ## 重要链接 - 官方网站：https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter - 支持和反馈：hi@backrun.co - 隐私政策：https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/help.html - 报告错误或请求功能：https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/contact.php ## 变更日志 ### 版本 1.0.0，初始版本 - 从多个 AI 平台导出对话 - 导出到各种格式的文档和云工作区 - 选择单个消息或导出完整对话 - 自定义字体系列、字体大小和文本颜色 - 保留格式、数学方程、代码块、列表和表格 ## 免责声明 AI Chat Exporter 是一个独立的第三方浏览器扩展。

sentences.en: It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to the developers of the platforms and services it supports.
sentences.zh: 它不隶属于其支持的平台和服务的开发人员，也不受其认可或正式关联。

sentences.en: All product names, logos, and brands mentioned are trademarks of their respective owners.
sentences.zh: 提及的所有产品名称、徽标和品牌均为其各自所有者的商标。

content_html_zh:
概述

适用于 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude 和 Grok 的 AI 聊天导出器。 只需点击几下，即可将聊天内容导出为 PDF、Word、Google Docs 和 Notion。

AI Chat Exporter 是一款一体化对话导出器，可将您的 AI 聊天转换为即用型文档，因此您无需再次手动复制和粘贴。 只需单击几下即可导出选定的消息或整个对话。 在导出之前自定义字体系列、字体大小和文本颜色，然后继续在您的首选工作区中编辑、共享、打印、存档或组织内容。 AI Exporter 可帮助您保留有价值的 AI 答案、代码会话、研究、撰写草稿、项目讨论和结构化输出，因此有用的工作永远不会在长聊天线程中丢失。 ## 主要功能 ### 适用于您已使用的 AI 平台 AI Chat Exporter 适用于您已使用的 AI 平台，为不同的 AI 助手提供一致的导出工作流程： - ChatGPT：导出答案、代码、表格和研究会话 - Gemini：保存聊天以进行编辑、共享、打印或文档 - Claude：导出对话、工件和结构化内容 - Grok：保存聊天并继续在其他地方处理内容 您无需为您使用的每个平台使用单独的导出器。 ### 将 AI 聊天导出为多种格式 AI Chat Exporter 可让您选择适合您工作流程的格式： - PDF 用于打印、存档、离线阅读或共享 - Word (.docx) 用于编辑、格式化或重复使用内容 - Google Docs 用于协作和在线编辑 - 用于知识管理、项目规划和组织笔记的概念 ### 导出选定的消息或完整对话 - 选择单个消息、部分、代码块或表格 - 仅导出与您的工作相关的答案 - 保存完整的对话以获取完整的上下文和内容存档 - 非常适合长时间的研究会议、写作会议和技术讨论 ### 自定义导出的文档 在导出之前，AI Chat Exporter 允许您调整文档的外观： - 选择字体系列 - 更改字体大小 - 选择文本颜色 - 仅输出 AI 或提示的结果。 与基本的复制和粘贴相比，这为您提供了更多控制权，尤其是在导出用于工作、学习、文档或团队共享的长 AI 对话时。 ### 保留丰富的对话结构 该扩展旨在在导出时保持格式完整，包括标题、编号和项目符号列表、代码块、表格、数学公式、链接和图像。 支持可能会因平台和对话类型而异。 ### 快速、无需帐户的工作流程 - 直接在您正在使用的聊天页面上工作 - 只需点击几下即可导出，标准导出不需要单独的帐户或 API 密钥 - 导出到外部工作区需要登录该服务 ## 使用案例 ### 开发人员和工程师 AI Chat Exporter 可帮助开发人员保存编码会话、调试对话、技术说明、架构计划、API 注释和代码审查讨论。 将 AI 编码对话导出到 Markdown 进行文档记录、Word 进行编辑、PDF 进行共享、Google Docs 进行协作或 Notion 进行内部知识管理。 ### 作者和编辑将文章大纲、草稿、编辑过的段落和内容摘要移至您首选的文档或工作区，而无需手动复制每个回复。 ### 研究人员和分析师将研究摘要、比较分析、市场研究和结构化调查结果存档，并将其发送到您的工作流程下一步需要的地方。 ### 学生和学者以任何适合您的格式保存学习笔记、解释、摘要和论文大纲，以供离线参考或进一步编辑。 ### 专业人士和团队 AI Chat Exporter 帮助将 AI 对话转化为可重复使用的业务文档。 以易于共享的格式保存会议准备、项目计划、头脑风暴会议、营销创意、客户研究、内部指南、流程文档和团队知识。 ### 内容创建者保存视频大纲、脚本草稿、新闻通讯想法和内容日历，然后在您选择的有组织的工作空间中继续开发它们。 ### 顾问和自由职业者将客户的讨论转化为提案、报告和建议，并使用定制的排版以达到精美、专业的效果。 ### 知识管理在原始聊天之外构建提示、答案、代码示例和研究结果的个人或团队库。 ## 如何导出 AI 聊天 1. 从 Chrome 网上应用店安装 AI Chat Exporter。 2. 打开您的 AI 聊天平台并开始或打开对话。 3. 可以选择自定义字体系列、字体大小和文本颜色。 4. 选择导出完整对话或仅导出选定的消息。 5. 选择您的目的地并出口。 ## 权限和要求 AI Chat Exporter 仅请求提供其导出功能所需的访问权限： - 访问您选择导出的 AI 聊天页面 - 下载将文件保存到您的设备的权限 - 访问您选择的在线工作区，仅当您选择该类型的导出时 仅当需要准备您请求的导出时才访问对话内容。 有关数据处理、存储和第三方集成的完整详细信息，请在安装前查看官方隐私政策。 要求：Google Chrome、受支持的 AI 平台上的活动会话以及具有您选择的导出目的地的帐户（如果需要），例如 Google Docs 或 Notion。 ## 为什么使用 AI Chat Exporter - 所有 AI 对话导出的一个扩展 - 一键导出为您需要的格式 - 保存选定的消息或完整对话 - 导出前自定义字体、大小和颜色 - 保留文本、列表、代码块、表格和结构化内容 - 消除重复的复制和粘贴 - 无需单独的帐户 - 定期更新以保持兼容性 ## 常见问题 ### 什么是 AI Chat Exporter？ AI Chat Exporter 是一款 Chrome 扩展程序，可让您将 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude 和 Grok 中的 AI 对话导出为 PDF、Word、Google Docs、Notion 或 Markdown。 ### AI Chat Exporter 是免费的吗？ 是的。 免费计划包括每月 7 次完整对话导出和 10 次选定消息导出，涵盖所有支持的目的地。 ### 支持哪些平台？ 今天有 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude 和 Grok，并计划在未来的更新中提供更多内容。 ### 有哪些导出格式可用？ PDF、Word (.docx)、Google 文档和 Notion。 ### 它支持表格和结构化内容吗？ 是的。 AI Chat Exporter 支持常见的 AI 对话内容，例如表格、列表、标题、代码块、链接、图像、数学公式和结构化响应。 结果可能因平台和导出格式而异。 ### 我需要一个帐户吗？ 尽管某些目的地需要登录其自己的服务，但不需要单独的帐户。 ### 我可以使用 AI Chat Exporter 进行长时间对话吗？ 是的，但性能可能会因对话长度和复杂程度而异。 ### 我的对话是否在导出过程中上传？ 仅访问生成您请求的导出所需的内容。 有关完整详细信息，请参阅隐私政策。 ## 重要链接 - 官方网站：https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter - 支持和反馈：hi@backrun.co - 隐私政策：https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/help.html - 报告错误或请求功能：https://backrun.co/ai-chat-exporter-suite/contact.php ## 变更日志 ### 版本 1.0.0，初始版本 - 从多个 AI 平台导出对话 - 导出到各种格式的文档和云工作区 - 选择单个消息或导出完整对话 - 自定义字体系列、字体大小和文本颜色 - 保留格式、数学方程、代码块、列表和表格 ## 免责声明 AI Chat Exporter 是一个独立的第三方浏览器扩展。 它不隶属于其支持的平台和服务的开发人员，也不受其认可或正式关联。 提及的所有产品名称、徽标和品牌均为其各自所有者的商标。
